evals.name: new-feature-consent
evals.prompt: เพิ่ม endpoint สำหรับ create consent record ใน consent service โดยต้องรับ citizen_id, purpose, channel แล้ว save ลง DB พร้อม audit log
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator selects New Feature workflow, delegates to BA → Architect → QA → Developer+QA (parallel) → Code Reviewer+Security (parallel), passes context between agents correctly, produces structured summary

assertions.name: correct-workflow-selected
assertions.check: Output mentions New Feature workflow selection

assertions.name: ba-runs-first
assertions.check: BA delegation appears before Architect delegation

assertions.name: parallel-steps-exist
assertions.description: Developer and QA run in parallel at step 4
assertions.check: Developer and QA are spawned in the same turn

assertions.name: context-passed-ba-to-architect
assertions.description: BA output (acceptance criteria) is passed to Architect prompt
assertions.check: Architect delegation includes BA's acceptance criteria or user stories

assertions.name: security-included
assertions.description: Security agent is involved in the pipeline

assertions.name: structured-summary
assertions.description: Final output follows the Summary format with Task, Workflow, Agents Used
assertions.check: Output contains Summary section with Task, Workflow, and Agents Used fields

evals.name: bugfix-consent-500
evals.prompt: consent service return 500 error ตอน get consent by citizen_id ที่มี record เยอะกว่า 100 records — น่าจะเป็น query performance issue
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator selects Bug Fix workflow, delegates to System Analyzer → Developer → QA → QA+Code Reviewer (parallel), passes root cause from analyzer to developer

assertions.name: correct-workflow-selected
assertions.check: Output mentions Bug Fix workflow selection

assertions.name: system-analyzer-first
assertions.description: System Analyzer runs first to diagnose
assertions.check: System Analyzer delegation appears before Developer

assertions.name: root-cause-passed-to-developer
assertions.description: System Analyzer's findings are passed to Developer
assertions.check: Developer delegation includes root cause or analysis results

assertions.name: qa-regression-test
assertions.check: QA is delegated to write regression test

assertions.name: parallel-final-step
assertions.description: QA and Code Reviewer run in parallel at final step
assertions.check: QA and Code Reviewer spawned together

evals.name: code-review-consent
evals.prompt: review code ใน internal/domain/consent/ ก่อน merge เข้า main ดูทั้ง convention, security, และ test coverage
evals.expected_output: Orchestrator selects Code Review workflow, delegates to Code Reviewer first, then Developer+Security+QA in parallel, produces findings with severity levels

assertions.name: correct-workflow-selected
assertions.check: Output mentions Code Review workflow selection

assertions.name: code-reviewer-first
assertions.check: Code Reviewer delegation appears before other agents

assertions.name: parallel-review-step
assertions.description: Developer, Security, and QA run in parallel at step 2
assertions.check: Developer, Security, and QA spawned together

assertions.name: code-reviewer-findings-passed
assertions.description: Code Reviewer findings passed to parallel agents
assertions.check: Parallel agent delegations include Code Reviewer's findings

assertions.name: structured-summary
assertions.check: Output contains Summary with Task, Workflow, Agents Used
